steps.name: Step 1 — Login with OTP, open the first transaction row, and verify Transaction ID and detail sections on the detail page
Step 3 — Widen date filter to "Last 90 Days" to ensure data exists
Step 4 — Read first Transaction ID from table
Step 5 — Click first row action icon to open detail page
Click locator('table tbody tr:first-child td:last-child button, table tbody tr:first-child td:last-child svg, table tbody tr:first-child td:last-child [role="button"]').first()
Step 6 — Verify Transaction ID on detail page
